verification_notes: Extracted via pdftotext. Requires human verification against source PDF.

invocation.description: Represents a sorcerer's ability to successfully cast spells learned from a particular source. Each incidence of Invocation must be assigned to a specific type or wellspring of sorcery (school, grimoire, mentor, etc.).

shaping.description: The method used to change the parameters of a sorcery spell. Never rolled against when casting — acts as a governor to limit the degree of modification. Only one Shaping skill needed regardless of how many schools known.

aig_adaptation.note: Per AiG p.60 overview: Invocation is replaced with whichever Rune Affinity is linked to that spell, further modified by the Four Principles (Combine/Separate, Command, Summon/Dismiss, Tap). Shaping is replaced by the sorcerer's Law Rune affinity.

starting_spells.note: A character starting the game as a sorcerer should choose a single school of sorcery to study. The number of starting spells is determined by the Cults and Brotherhoods chapter (p.196) based on cult/school membership rank.
starting_spells.school_choice: One school chosen at character creation; others can be discovered during play

casting_cost.description: Sorcerer's Magic Point Attribute is temporarily reduced by the number of Magic Points used to cast that spell until the magic is dropped or expires.
casting_cost.base_cost: 1 Magic Point per spell (before shaping additions)

shaping_parameters.description: Shaping Points may be divided amongst the following components to optimise the spell. Each point allocated increases that parameter by one step.

components.name: Combine
components.description: Permits combining multiple sorcery spells into a single casting. All conjoined spells share the same shaping components.

components.name: Duration
components.description: Default duration = POW of caster in minutes. Each shaping point extends duration (minutes → hours → days → etc.)

components.name: Magnitude
components.description: Used to penetrate magical defences or resist magical attacks

components.name: Range
components.description: Used to increase the distance a spell can be cast over

components.name: Targets
components.description: Used to increase the number of targets affected by the spell

spell_list.note: Each spell has a specific (Substance), (Creature), (Characteristic), or (Sense) type that must be specified when learned.

schools_of_sorcery.description: Sorcery schools define which spells are available. Each school is themed around a concept or element. Example: Masters of Shadow may learn Dominate (Reptiles), Palsy, Sculpt Darkness, Smother, Teleport (via Shadows), and Wrack (Darkness). Masters of Metamorphosis may learn spells controlling the changing of things: Abjure, Diminish, Enhance, Sculpt, Shapechange, Transmogrify.
schools_of_sorcery.note_for_glorantha: In Glorantha, sorcery schools map to cults. Arkat's cult lists Invocation and Shaping as cult skills. The cult's spell list (from one-pager) defines which sorcery spells are available.
